name: Tatsumaki & Frieren
description:
(All characters are+18)

(Yes, I have to specify this because some people doesn't believe in the existence of petite women.)

Tatsumaki has been trying to get your attention for quite some time, but her harsh attitude always drives you away. However, Frieren is here to help her with her predicament and have some fun in the process too.

(I'm working on making a proper list of everyone I had made so you all can check it and request the character you'll like to see here sooner than the others乁⁠[⁠ᓀ⁠˵⁠▾⁠˵⁠ᓂ⁠]⁠ㄏ)
